extension.description: VS Code support for source-controlled Excel VBA projects powered by xlflow.
configuration.title: xlflow
configuration.xlflow.lsp.enabled.descrip: Start xlflow lsp --stdio for VBA files.
configuration.xlflow.lsp.logFile.descrip: Log file passed to xlflow lsp --stdio.
configuration.xlflow.lsp.trace.server.de: Trace verbosity for the xlflow language server output channel.
configuration.xlflow.codeLens.enabled.de: Show xlflow CodeLens actions above runnable VBA procedures.
configuration.xlflow.codeLens.runProcedu: Show Run actions above runnable VBA procedures.
configuration.xlflow.codeLens.runTests.d: Show Run Test actions above VBA test procedures.
configuration.xlflow.codeLens.userFormEv: Show Run actions above UserForm event handlers.
configuration.xlflow.run.saveBeforeRun.d: Save dirty VBA documents before running a procedure.
configuration.xlflow.completion.triggerS: Trigger VS Code suggestions while typing likely VBA statement and declaration prefixes.
configuration.xlflow.completion.progIdsI: Trigger VS Code suggestions inside CreateObject and GetObject ProgID string literals.
configuration.xlflow.testing.autoDiscove: Automatically discover VBA tests for VS Code Test Explorer when an xlflow workspace opens.
